sqlMap.select: SELECT TITLE , TITLE2 , POSTDATE , CONTENT, ITEMSEQ FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT TITLE , TITLE2 , CONTENT , WIDTH , HEIGHT , POSITION , STARTDATE , ENDDATE, SKINVALUE FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE CompanyID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pTotal# - #v_pStart# ) temp ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ( CASE WHEN (STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) PROGRESS FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , PROGRESS FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ( CASE WHEN (STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE > TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) PROGRESS FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pTotal# - #v_pStart# ) temp ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#

isEqual.isEmpty: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , URL FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND IMAGEPATH like '%SLIDERIMAGE%' ORDER BY SN
isEqual.isNotEmpty: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , NVL(URL, ' ') FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND SLIDERID = #sliderID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN

select.isNotEqual: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , URL FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND ISUSE = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND IMAGEPATH like '%SLIDERIMAGE%' ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT QUICKLINKID , QUICKLINKNAME , QUICKLINKNAME2 , QUICKLINKNAME3 , QUICKLINKNAME4 , QUICKLINKNAME5 , QUICKLINKNAME6 , LINKTYPE , LINKTYPEURL, URL , REGUSERID , SIZE_ FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT QUICKLINKID , ACCESSID , NVL(CASE WHEN USER_TYPE = 'USER' THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = ACCESSID) WHEN USER_TYPE = 'DEPT' THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = ACCESSID) WHEN USER_TYPE = 'JIKWI' THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND jobid = ACCESSID AND type = '001') WHEN USER_TYPE = 'JIKCHEK' THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND jobid = ACCESSID AND type = '002') WHEN USER_TYPE = 'GROUP' THEN (SELECT group_name FROM tbl_permissiongrouplist WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND group_id = ACCESSID) END, '') AS ACCESSNAME, NVL(CASE WHEN USER_TYPE = 'USER' THEN (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = ACCESSID) WHEN USER_TYPE = 'DEPT' THEN (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = ACCESSID) WHEN USER_TYPE = 'JIKWI' THEN (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND jobid = ACCESSID AND type = '001') WHEN USER_TYPE = 'JIKCHEK' THEN (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND jobid = ACCESSID AND type = '002') WHEN USER_TYPE = 'GROUP' THEN (SELECT group_name FROM tbl_permissiongrouplist WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND group_id = ACCESSID) END, '') AS ACCESSNAME2, VIEW_FLAG, USER_TYPE as userType, SUBDEPT_PERMITTED as subdeptPermitted FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT RESULT , COUNT(RESULT) COUNT FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RESULT ORDER BY RESULT

SELECT ITEMSEQ , STARTDATE , NVL(ENDDATE, TO_DATE('1900-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) EndDate , POLLSELECTIONCOUNT , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , ANSWER1 , ANSWER2 , ANSWER3 , ANSWER4 , ANSWER5 , ANSWER6 , ANSWER7 , ANSWER8 , ANSWER9 , ANSWER10 FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ, TITLE, TITLE2, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, POSITION, INUSE, ( CASE WHEN (STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) PROGRESS FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ, TITLE, TITLE2, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, POSITION, INUSE, ( CASE WHEN (STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) PROGRESS FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ, TITLE, TITLE2, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, POSITION, INUSE FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pTotal# - #v_pStart# ) temp ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_pCount#

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN , NVL(B.DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME) DISPLAYNAME, NVL(B.DISPLAYNAME2, A.DISPLAYNAME2) DISPLAYNAME2, A.DEPARTMENT , A.DESCRIPTION , A.DESCRIPTION2 , A.COMPANY , A.COMPANY2 , A.TITLE , A.TITLE2 , B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FILEPATH , A.TERM FROM TBL_PS_EMPMONTH A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_pCompanyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TERM LIKE CONCAT(#v_pYear#, '%')

SELECT QUICKLINKID , CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN QUICKLINKNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN QUICKLINKNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN QUICKLINKNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN QUICKLINKNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '5' THEN QUICKLINKNAME5 ELSE QUICKLINKNAME6 END AS QUICKLINKNAME , LINKTYPE , LINKTYPEURL , URL , REGDATE , MODIDATE , REGUSERID , CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK Q JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON Q.RegUserID = U.CN AND Q.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE Q.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND Q.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY Q.LINKORDER ASC

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) ( QUICKLINKID, QUICKLINKNAME, QUICKLINKNAME2, QUICKLINKNAME3, QUICKLINKNAME4, LINKTYPE, LINKTYPEURL, URL, REGDATE, REGUSERID, SIZE_, LINKORDER, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#) OR COMPANYID = 'Top' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_NOTICE ( ITEMSEQ, COMPANYID, TITLE, TITLE2, CONTENT, POSTDATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_PS_NOTICE_ITEMSEQ.NEXTVAL, #companyID#, #v_pTitle#, #v_pTitle2#, #v_pContent#, to_date(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PS_QUICKLINK ( QUICKLINKID, QUICKLINKNAME, QUICKLINKNAME2, QUICKLINKNAME3, QUICKLINKNAME4, QUICKLINKNAME5, QUICKLINKNAME6, LINKTYPE, LINKTYPEURL, URL, REGDATE, REGUSERID, SIZE_, LINKORDER, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #v_QUICKLINKID#, #v_QUICKLINKNAME#, #v_QUICKLINKNAME2#, #v_QUICKLINKNAME3#, ' ', #v_QUICKLINKNAME5#, #v_QUICKLINKNAME6#, #v_LINKTYPE#, #v_LINKTYPEURL#, #v_URL#, #v_NOWDATE#, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_SIZE#, #LINKORDER#, #tenantID#, #companyID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_QUICKLINK SET QUICKLINKNAME = #v_QUICKLINKNAME#, QUICKLINKNAME2 = #v_QUICKLINKNAME2#, QUICKLINKNAME3 = #v_QUICKLINKNAME3#, QUICKLINKNAME4 = #v_QUICKLINKNAME4#, QUICKLINKNAME5 = #v_QUICKLINKNAME5#, QUICKLINKNAME6 = #v_QUICKLINKNAME6#, LINKTYPE = #v_LINKTYPE#, LINKTYPEURL = #v_LINKTYPEURL#, URL = #v_URL#, MODIDATE = #v_NOWDATE#, SIZE_ = #v_SIZE# WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL ( QUICKLINKID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, VIEW_FLAG, USER_TYPE, SUBDEPT_PERMITTED, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #v_QUICKLINKID#, #v_ACCESSID#, CASE WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'USER' THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #v_ACCESSID#) WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'DEPT' THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #v_ACCESSID#) WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'JIKWI' THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND jobid = #v_ACCESSID# AND type = '001') WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'JIKCHEK' THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND jobid = #v_ACCESSID# AND type = '002') WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'GROUP' THEN (SELECT group_name FROM tbl_permissiongrouplist WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND group_id = #v_ACCESSID#) END, CASE WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'USER' THEN (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #v_ACCESSID#) WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'DEPT' THEN (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #v_ACCESSID#) WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'JIKWI' THEN (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND jobid = #v_ACCESSID# AND type = '001') WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'JIKCHEK' THEN (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND jobid = #v_ACCESSID# AND type = '002') WHEN #v_USER_TYPE# = 'GROUP' THEN (SELECT group_name FROM tbl_permissiongrouplist WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND group_id = #v_ACCESSID#) END, #v_VIEW_FLAG#, #v_USER_TYPE#, #v_SUBDEPT_PERMITTED#, #tenantID# FROM DUAL
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_NOTICE SET TITLE = #v_pTitle#, TITLE2 = #v_pTitle2#, CONTENT = #v_pContent# WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL SET ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE ITEMSEQ = ( SELECT ITEMSEQ FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL SET ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE ITEMSEQ = ( SELECT ITEMSEQ FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND ENDDATE >= TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC ) ) AND CompanyID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL ( ITEMSEQ, COMPANYID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, POLLSELECTIONCOUNT, POLLTITLE, POLLTITLE2, ANSWER1, ANSWER2, ANSWER3, ANSWER4, ANSWER5, ANSWER6, ANSWER7, ANSWER8, ANSWER9, ANSWER10, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL_ITEMSEQ.NEXTVAL, #v_pCompanyID#, TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_pSelectionCount#, #v_pPollTitle#, #v_pPollTitle2#, #v_pAnswer1#, #v_pAnswer2#, #v_pAnswer3#, #v_pAnswer4#, #v_pAnswer5#, #v_pAnswer6#, #v_pAnswer7#, #v_pAnswer8#, #v_pAnswer9#, #v_pAnswer10#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL ( ITEMSEQ, COMPANYID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, POLLSELECTIONCOUNT, POLLTITLE, POLLTITLE2, ANSWER1, ANSWER2, ANSWER3, ANSWER4, ANSWER5, ANSWER6, ANSWER7, ANSWER8, ANSWER9, ANSWER10, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL_ITEMSEQ.NEXTVAL, UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#), TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_pSelectionCount#, #v_pPollTitle#, #v_pPollTitle2#, #v_pAnswer1#, #v_pAnswer2#, #v_pAnswer3#, #v_pAnswer4#, #v_pAnswer5#, #v_pAnswer6#, #v_pAnswer7#, #v_pAnswer8#, #v_pAnswer9#, #v_pAnswer10#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PS_POPUP ( ITEMSEQ, COMPANYID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, POSITION, TITLE, TITLE2, CONTENT, TENANT_ID, INUSE, SKINVALUE) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_PS_POPUP_ITEMSEQ.NEXTVAL, #v_pCompanyID#, TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_pWidth#, #v_pHeight#, #v_pPosition#, #v_pTitle#, #v_pTitle2#, #v_pContent#, #tenantID#, 1, #skinValue# )
SELECT SEQ_TBL_PS_POPUP_ITEMSEQ.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_POPUP SET STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), WIDTH = #v_pWidth#, HEIGHT = #v_pHeight#, POSITION = #v_pPosition#, TITLE = #v_pTitle#, TITLE2 = #v_pTitle2#, CONTENT = #v_pContent#, SKINVALUE = #skinValue# WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_PS_EMPMONTH ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2, TITLE, TITLE2, TERM, DATE_, TENANT_ID) ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , #v_pTerm# , to_date(#v_pTerm#, 'YYYY-MM') , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_pUserID# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_pDeptID#
AND TITLE = #jobName#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# UNION SELECT B.CN , B.DISPLAYNAME , B.DISPLAYNAME2 , C.CN , C.DISPLAYNAME , C.DISPLAYNAME2 , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS COMPANY , COMPNM2 AS COMPANY2 , A.TITLE , A.TITLE2 , #v_pTerm# , to_date(#v_pTerm#, 'YYYY-MM') , A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_pUserID# AND A.DEPTID = #v_pDeptID#
AND A.TITLE = #jobName#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_PS_EMPMONTH WHERE TERM = #v_pTerm# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND IMAGEPATH like '%SLIDERIMAGE%'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE ( SLIDERID, SLIDERNAME, SLIDERNAME2, FILENAME, IMAGEPATH, REGUSERID, REGDATE, COMPANYID, ISUSE, SN, TENANT_ID, URL ) VALUES ( #v_SLIDERID#, #v_SLIDERNAME#, #v_SLIDERNAME2#, #v_FILENAME#, #v_IMAGEPATH#, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_REGDATE#, #v_COMPANYID#, #v_ISUSE#, #count# + 1, #tenantID#, #v_URL# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET SLIDERNAME = #v_SLIDERNAME#, SLIDERNAME2 = #v_SLIDERNAME2#, FILENAME = #v_FILENAME#, IMAGEPATH = #v_IMAGEPATH#, URL = #v_URL# WHERE SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET ISUSE = #v_VALUE# WHERE SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET SN = #v_VALUE# WHERE SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE USING ( SELECT TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE.ROWID row_id, TEMPTABLE.SN FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE JOIN ( SELECT SLIDERID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY SN ) SN FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE ) TEMPTABLE ON TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE.SliderID = TEMPTABLE.SLIDERID ) src ON ( TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE.ROWID = src.row_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SN = src.SN
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_PS_QUICKLINK WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE QUICKLINKID = #quickLinkID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LIGHTPOLLOPTIONID, USERID, ISPREVIEW, TENANTID FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL_OPTION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL_OPTION (LIGHTPOLLOPTIONID, USERID, ISPREVIEW, TENANTID) VALUES (#lightpollOptionId# ,#userId#, 0, #tenantId# )
SELECT NVL(MAX(LIGHTPOLLOPTIONID) + 1,1) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL_OPTION
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = #isPreview# WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT POPUPOPTIONID, USERID, ISPREVIEW, TENANTID FROM TBL_PS_POPUP_OPTION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_PS_POPUP_OPTION (POPUPOPTIONID, USERID, ISPREVIEW, TENANTID) VALUES (#popupOptionId# ,#userId#, 0, #tenantId# )
SELECT NVL(MAX(POPUPOPTIONID)+1,1) FROM TBL_PS_POPUP_OPTION
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_POPUP_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = #isPreview# WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_POPUP SET INUSE = #inUse# WHERE ITEMSEQ = #itemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

UPDATE TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL SET STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , POLLSELECTIONCOUNT = #v_pSelectionCount# , POLLTITLE = #v_pPollTitle# , POLLTITLE2 = #v_pPollTitle2# , ANSWER1 = #v_pAnswer1# , ANSWER2 = #v_pAnswer2# , ANSWER3 = #v_pAnswer3# , ANSWER4 = #v_pAnswer4# , ANSWER5 = #v_pAnswer5# , ANSWER6 = #v_pAnswer6# , ANSWER7 = #v_pAnswer7# , ANSWER8 = #v_pAnswer8# , ANSWER9 = #v_pAnswer9# , ANSWER10 = #v_pAnswer10# WHERE ITEMSEQ = #itemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL SET STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , POLLSELECTIONCOUNT = #v_pSelectionCount# , POLLTITLE = #v_pPollTitle# , POLLTITLE2 = #v_pPollTitle2# , ANSWER1 = #v_pAnswer1# , ANSWER2 = #v_pAnswer2# , ANSWER3 = #v_pAnswer3# , ANSWER4 = #v_pAnswer4# , ANSWER5 = #v_pAnswer5# , ANSWER6 = #v_pAnswer6# , ANSWER7 = #v_pAnswer7# , ANSWER8 = #v_pAnswer8# , ANSWER9 = #v_pAnswer9# , ANSWER10 = #v_pAnswer10# WHERE ITEMSEQ = #itemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CompanyID = #v_pCompanyID#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #itemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND RESULT IN
#sbQuery[]#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #itemSeq# AND USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_QUICKLINK SET LINKORDER = #v_LINKORDER# WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(LINKORDER), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK Q JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON Q.RegUserID = U.CN AND Q.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE Q.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET SN = #v_SN# WHERE SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

MERGE INTO TBL_PS_POPUP_USER USING DUAL ON (itemseq = #itemSeq# and subdept_permitted = #subdeptPermitted# and sn = #sn#) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET user_id = #userId#, user_type = #userType#, tenant_id = #tenantId#, companyid = #companyId# WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (itemseq, user_id, user_type, tenant_id, companyid, subdept_permitted, sn) VALUES (#itemSeq#, #userId#, #userType#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #subdeptPermitted#, #sn#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.itemseq, A.user_id as userid, A.user_type as usertype, CASE WHEN user_type = 'USER' THEN NVL( (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn = user_id), '') WHEN user_type = 'DEPT' THEN NVL( (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = user_id), '') WHEN user_type = 'JIKWI' THEN NVL( (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyid = #companyId# AND jobid = user_id AND type = '001'), '') WHEN user_type = 'JIKCHEK' THEN NVL( (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyid = #companyId# AND jobid = user_id AND type = '002'), '') WHEN user_type = 'GROUP' THEN NVL((SELECT group_name FROM tbl_permissiongrouplist WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND group_id = user_id), '') END AS username, A.tenant_id as tenantid, A.companyid, A.subdept_permitted as subdeptPermitted, A.sn FROM TBL_PS_POPUP_USER A WHERE A.itemseq = #itemSeq# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.companyid = #companyId# ORDER BY A.sn
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PS_POPUP_USER WHERE itemseq = #v_pItemSeq# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
